data.title: Iran Rejects Option to Move Enriched Uranium Abroad
data.description: On April 18, Iran's Foreign Ministry announced that the option to transfer Iran's enriched uranium to another country has been dismissed. According to BlockBeats, this decision marks a significant stance in Iran's nuclear policy. The move comes amid ongoing discussions and international scrutiny over Iran's nuclear activities.

data.title: British Officials Highlight Impact of Iran Conflict on US Relations
data.description: British officials attending the IMF and World Bank spring meetings have emphasized the enduring impact of the Iran conflict on the United Kingdom's relationship with the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, noting that the discussions at the meetings underscored the geopolitical tensions and their implications for international diplomacy. The conflict has strained ties between the two nations, with British representatives expressing concerns over future diplomatic engagements and cooperation. The meetings served as a platform for officials to address these challenges and explore potential avenues for mitigating the conflict's effects on bilateral relations.

data.title: Iran reopens some airspace
data.description: Iran's Civil Aviation Organization announced the reopening of some of Iran's airspace. (Xinhua)

data.title: Rumen Radev's Party Leads Polls Ahead of Bulgarian Election
data.description: Rumen Radev, known for his critical stance towards the European Union and his outreach to Russia, is seeing his new political party leading in the polls ahead of Bulgaria's upcoming election on Sunday. Bloomberg posted on X that Radev's party is gaining significant traction among voters, reflecting a shift in the political landscape of the country. As Bulgaria prepares for the election, the influence of Radev's party could signal changes in the nation's approach to both EU relations and its foreign policy direction.

data.title: Iran Reopens Portions of Airspace
data.description: On April 18, Iran's Civil Aviation Organization announced the reopening of certain areas of its airspace. According to BlockBeats, this decision marks a significant development in the region's aviation sector. The reopening is expected to facilitate increased air traffic and improve connectivity for international flights. The move comes after previous restrictions were imposed due to various geopolitical and security concerns. The organization has not specified which areas are affected by this change, but it is anticipated to have a positive impact on the country's aviation industry.

data.title: Putin's special envoy: US waivers on Russian oil will affect more than 100 million barrels of oil en route.
data.description: Market news: A special envoy of Russian President Vladimir Putin stated that the US waiver for Russian oil will affect more than 100 million barrels of oil already in transit. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Exemption on Russian Oil to Impact Over 100 Million Barrels
data.description: On April 18, market reports indicate that a statement from a special envoy of Russian President Vladimir Putin suggests that the U.S. exemption on Russian oil will affect more than 100 million barrels of oil in transit. According to BlockBeats, this development could have significant implications for the global oil market.

data.title: AI Sparks Awakening in Gen Z and Alpha Generations, Bitcoin Seen as Wealth Storage Tool
data.description: AI is emerging as a catalyst for awakening among Generation Z and Alpha, with Bitcoin anticipated to serve as a tool for wealth storage. According to PANews, the influence of artificial intelligence is reshaping perspectives and financial strategies for these younger generations. As they become more attuned to technological advancements, Bitcoin is increasingly viewed as a viable option for preserving wealth. This shift highlights the growing intersection between digital currencies and generational trends, underscoring the transformative impact of AI on financial behaviors.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs See Continued Inflows, Led by Fidelity's FETH
data.description: U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs experienced net inflows totaling approximately $127.4 million on April 17, marking the seventh consecutive day of positive flows. According to NS3.AI, data from Farside Investors indicated that Fidelity's FETH was the leading contributor, with $84.1 million in inflows.

data.title: Anthropic's Next Funding Round Probabilities on Polymarket
data.description:
Polymarket has introduced a new event contract regarding the timeline for Anthropic's next funding round. According to Odaily, the probability of completion by the end of June is currently at 22%, while by the end of December, it stands at 81%.

The contract stipulates that if Anthropic publicly and officially announces the completion of its next funding round by the specified date (Eastern Time), the market will resolve as 'Yes.' Otherwise, it will resolve as 'No.' Qualified announcements must clearly confirm the completion of the new funding round and can be made through official channels such as press releases, investor announcements, regulatory filings, or consensus reports from credible media. Informal announcements, anonymous sources, or leaks do not qualify. If Anthropic is unable to complete the funding round due to acquisition, merger, or absorption by another entity, the market will resolve as 'No.' The primary settlement sources for this market will be Anthropic's official announcements and documents, such as SEC filings, though credible consensus reports may also be used.

data.title: Polymarket Predicts Powell's Departure from Fed Chair
data.description:
A new prediction market on Polymarket is speculating on when Jerome Powell will step down as Federal Reserve Chair. According to Odaily, the highest probability is for the week of June 6 to June 12, at 20%, followed by May 30 to June 5, at 18%.

The contract rules specify that the market will settle based on the designated date range when Powell actually leaves the position. Announcements of resignation or dismissal alone do not meet the criteria, nor does the scheduled end of Powell's term. If Powell continues as interim chair until a successor is confirmed, he will not be considered to have vacated the position. The market is limited to Powell's tenure as Fed Chair, and his role as a regular member of the Federal Reserve Board will not affect the settlement. All dates are based on Eastern Time.

data.title: Hakimi Market Value Surges Over $19 Million Amid Volatility
data.description: Hakimi's market value has surged past $19 million, currently reported at $18.9 million, with a daily increase of over 90%. According to ChainCatcher, the meme coin's price fluctuations are significant, and investors are advised to be cautious of the associated risks.

data.title: Polymarket has added a new listing: "Deadline for Claude developer Anthropic's next funding round."
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, a new event has been added to Polymarket: "Claude developer Anthropic's next funding round deadline." The probability of the funding round being completed by the end of June is currently estimated at 22%, and by the end of December at 81%. The event's contract rules state that if the designated company publicly and officially announces the completion of its next funding round by the specified date (Eastern Time), the market will be classified as "Yes." Otherwise, the market will be classified as "No." A valid announcement must clearly confirm the completion of the new funding round, which can be confirmed through official announcements from the designated company (such as press releases) or its investors, regulatory documents, or consensus from credible media reports. Informal announcements, statements from anonymous sources, or leaks are not acceptable. If the designated company is unable to complete the new funding round due to acquisition, merger, or absorption by another entity, the market will be classified as "No." The primary settlement source for this market will be the designated company's official announcements and official company documents, such as SEC filings; however, credible consensus reports are also acceptable. Odaily Seer continuously monitors prediction markets, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Polymarket has added a new article titled "When Will Powell Step Down as Fed Chair?", with a preliminary probability of 20% for the event occurring between June 6th and 12th.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that Polymarket has launched a new event, "When will Powell step down as Fed Chair?" Currently, the highest probability (20%) is between June 6th and 12th, followed by May 30th to June 5th (18%). The event contract rules state that this market will settle based on a specified date range for Powell's resignation as Fed Chair. "Resignation" means Powell is no longer effectively serving as Fed Chair. An announcement of Powell's resignation or dismissal does not alone qualify. The scheduled end of Powell's term does not alone qualify. If Powell continues to serve as interim chair (e.g., until a successor is confirmed), he will not be considered to have resigned. This market is limited to the period during which Powell serves as Fed Chair. Powell's status as a regular member of the Fed Board of Governors does not affect the settlement of this market. All dates are in Eastern Time. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing in.

data.title: Token Outperforms Bitcoin and Ether Amid Consolidation
data.description:
A specific token has shown a slight edge over bitcoin and ether in the past week, marking a notable performance in the cryptocurrency market. According to CoinDesk, despite this advancement, the token's movement remains within consolidation territory due to reduced participation from traders and investors. This trend highlights the ongoing volatility and unpredictability in the crypto space, where market dynamics can shift rapidly based on various factors.

The token's performance comes at a time when the broader cryptocurrency market is experiencing fluctuations, with major players like bitcoin and ether facing challenges in maintaining upward momentum. The thinning participation suggests that while the token has managed to outperform its larger counterparts, the overall market sentiment remains cautious. Investors are closely monitoring these developments, as they could signal potential shifts in investment strategies and market behavior.

As the cryptocurrency landscape continues to evolve, the performance of individual tokens can offer insights into emerging trends and investor preferences. The current consolidation phase indicates a period of uncertainty, where market participants are evaluating their positions and strategies. This environment underscores the importance of staying informed and adaptable in the fast-paced world of digital assets, where opportunities and risks coexist.

data.title: XRP Rises 8% in a Week, Outperforming Bitcoin and Ether
data.description: XRP has experienced an 8% increase over the past week, with a daily rise of approximately 3%, surpassing the performance of both Bitcoin and Ether. According to NS3.AI, the price of XRP is approaching $1.43, although it remains below the $1.44 resistance level despite several attempts to break through.

data.title: Binance's $530 million record high has hit a new all-time high.
data.description: According to GMGN market data, Binance Life's market capitalization has broken all-time high, currently trading at $530 million, with a daily increase of over 50%.

data.title: China's Clean Technology Exports Surge Amid Global Energy Shift
data.description: China's exports of clean technology saw a significant increase in March, highlighting the country's growing role in the global shift towards alternative energy sources. Bloomberg posted on X, noting that this surge comes as manufacturers capitalize on the rising demand for clean energy solutions, driven by disruptions in traditional energy supplies due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. This trend underscores China's strategic positioning in the clean energy sector, as it continues to expand its influence in the global market.
